query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) 
SELECT name, (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SA'), 1 FROM (
  SELECT 'Riyadh' as name UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Jeddah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Mecca' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Medina' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Dammam' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Khobar' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Dhahran' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Tabuk' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Abha' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Taif' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Jubail' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Yanbu' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Khamis Mushait' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Buraidah' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Najran'
) AS cities_list
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
